title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at SBI Life Insurance - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at SBI Life Insurance - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Risk Analyst with drive and ambition, SBI Life Insurance in Bengaluru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About SBI Life Insurance:
SBI Life Insurance is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Tally

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SBI Life Insurance!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
